final_answer:
From the search results, we can see that PS Fader's studies in 2018-2019 include a "beta-geometric (BG)" distribution model for projecting customer retention.

Comparing the two studies, we find that both Manash Pratim Kashyap and PS Fader used a "Simple Model" and "beta-geometric (BG)" distribution respectively for their customer retention studies. 

The two-word type of model they have in common is:

Simple Model

beta-geometric (BG)

Snippet: Fader and Hardie (2007), hereafter FH, presented the beta-geometric (BG) distribution as a simple probability model for projecting customer retention.
